emails.subject: k#62164
emails.body: k#62164 Is contract 62164 a valid contract on CGAS? It was highlighted in red in the 2000ces02.xls sheet. I updated the info based on what I see in Navigator and highlighted it in yellow. And, if this is a valid deal, we need to add it to Sitara.
